@graph.name: SCREENFLEX® 110/200 LiYCY VC4V-K
@graph.description: Flexible screened PVC cable, for safe signal transmission. ACCORDING TO: EN 50525 / IEC 60502-1. SCREENFLEX® 110/200 LiYCY VC4V-K is a screened control cable for control circuits, electronic equipment connections, and computer systems. The aluminium-polyester tape screen with tinned copper drain wire provides superior EMI/RFI shielding ensuring signal integrity in electrically noisy environments.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Industrial Projects)

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - SCREENFLEX® 110/200 LiYCY VC4V-K
subjectOf.description: Complete technical specifications, engineering data and certifications for the cable.

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Electrolytic annealed copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Screen
additionalProperty.value: Overlapping aluminium-polyester tape screen with 100% coverage and tinned copper drain wire

additionalProperty.name: Rated Voltage
additionalProperty.value: 300/500 V (up to 1.5 mm²) and 0.6/1 kV (from 2.5 mm²)

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: Fire Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Fire non-propagation according to EN 60332-3 / IEC 60332-3 (grey sheath only)

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: Cca-s2, d1, a3 (grey 300/500 V) / Cca-s3, d1, a3 (grey 0.6/1 kV) / Eca (black) according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Control circuits, Electronic equipment, Signal transmission
